settings.heading: What are Cherokee Infinity men's scrubs?
settings.content: Infinity men's scrubs are Cherokee's performance workwear line — engineered for healthcare professionals who push boundaries with confidence and style. Built with moisture-wicking stretch poplin, flexible knit panels, and odor-fighting PROTX2® technology, these modern mixed-media scrubs go beyond athleisure to power your limitless potential.

settings.heading: What fabric and technology is used in Infinity men's scrubs?
settings.content: Infinity men's scrubs are built with moisture-wicking stretch poplin combined with flexible knit panels —  that keeps you cool and dry while giving you a full range of motion wherever you need it. PROTX2® technology is built into the fabric to fight odors throughout your shift, keeping you sharp and comfortable from start to finish. The result is scrubs that blend athletic performance with professional polish in a way that standard workwear can't.

settings.heading: What styles does Cherokee Infinity offer for men?
settings.content: The men's Infinity line covers scrub tops in V-neck silhouettes — both a stretch poplin cut and a knit panel construction — plus a zip pocket polo-style scrub shirt. For pants: a drawstring jogger and a zip fly cargo pant, both Best Sellers. Two jacket styles are available — a zip front rib panel scrub jacket and a zip neck pullover scrub jacket. Scrub sets pairing a top and cargo pant are available in an extensive color range. The line also includes athletic accessories: compression calf sleeves and athletic ankle and crew socks designed to complement the Infinity aesthetic.

settings.heading: How many pockets do Cherokee Infinity men's scrubs have?
settings.content: The men's Infinity zip fly cargo scrub pant has 6 pockets — the most storage in the line and one of the highest pocket counts in Cherokee's men's lineup. It pairs with the V-neck scrub top as a Best Seller scrub set. Tops and the polo-style shirt offer front pocket storage. For professionals who need maximum on-shift storage, the cargo pant is the standout option in the men's Infinity line.

settings.heading: Who are Cherokee Infinity men's scrubs designed for?
settings.content: Built for male nurses, LPNs, RNs, medical assistants, surgical techs, and other healthcare professionals who want high-performance scrubs that keep pace with a demanding shift without sacrificing professional style. Infinity is engineered for movement — the mixed-media construction of stretch poplin and knit panels means the scrubs flex where you need them to and look sharp where it counts. If you spend long hours on your feet in hospitals, clinics, or surgical settings and need scrubs that perform at the level you do, Infinity was built for that.
